name: Tiny Tapeout :: Quicker, easier and cheaper to make your own chip!
snippet: Tiny Tapeout makes it more accessible than ever to get your designs manufactured on a real chip! Read how it works here.

name: Universities & Schools :: Quicker, easier and cheaper to make your own chip!
snippet:
Tiny Tapeout is a great way to teach digital design and get real chips back. Give your students hands-on experience with building their own application- ...
Give your students hands-on experience with building their own application-specific integrated circuits and taking them all the way through to production - with the goal of holding a fully-packaged and ready-to-use chip in their hand at the end of the process.

name: Tiny Tapeout
snippet: Tiny Tapeout is a service that makes manufacturing ASICs (chips) affordable and accessible to students and makers.

name: Tiny Tapeout - Zero to ASIC Course
snippet: Tiny Tapeout aims to make it easier and cheaper than ever to design and manufacture custom Application-Specific Integrated Circuits (ASICs). I originally conceived of the idea in September 2022 as a way to guarantee silicon for my course participants.

name: Education & Outreach – SwissChips | ETH Zurich
snippet: Tiny Tapeout for SwissChips: Open-source IC design for everyone We are collaborating with Tiny Tapeout and the Leibniz Institute for High Performance Microelectronics (IHP) to support SwissChips with outreach activities, bringing open-source IC design to students and enthusiasts through chip design tutorials and workshops, and helping to make integrated circuit (IC) design more accessible, so ...

name: Matthew Venn Launches Tiny Tapeout 3 to Take You "From Idea
snippet: The Tiny Tapeout program launched last year as a spin-off from Venn's Zero to ASIC course, which sought to take university-level students with no prior chip design experience to the point of being able to design their own application-specific integrated circuit (ASIC).
